5:T418,A batch of papers pushes beyond scaling laws to fundamentally redesign how LLMs handle context, verification, and dynamic inputs. CompactionRL trains agents to jointly summarize and execute tasks, achieving 66.8% Pass@1 on SWE-bench Verified by overcoming context limits. LLM-as-a-Verifier introduces a general verification framework that computes continuous scores from logits, improving separation of correct solutions and establishing verification as a new axis for scaling compute. CamVLA eliminates the need for camera calibration in robot manipulation by predicting both end-effector actions and a hand-eye matrix, enabling robust deployment in changing viewpoints. The collection also includes weak-to-strong distillation for efficient RL generalization and SearchGen-Bench, which diagnoses hallucination in visual generation at knowledge boundaries, advocating for agentic search strategies. Together, they show that the next leap in agent performance will come from integrated architectures that manage memory, uncertainty, and perception.6:T42c,Real‑world deployment is under intense scrutiny. Fable 5 achieved a 16.1% automation rate on paid freelance work—a sixfold jump in eight months—yet the Senior SWE‑Bench reveals that even the best models fail over 75% of senior‑engineer‑level tasks requiring correctness and taste. Enterprises are retreating from flagship models due to cost: companies like Citibank and Adobe have downgraded or blocked expensive AI services after monthly bills skyrocketed, while Microsoft launched a $2.5 billion “Frontier Company” to co‑deploy AI with clients, sidestepping the traditional consulting model. Keling AI’s $2 billion compute‑infrastructure raise and Google’s 37% rise in electricity consumption underscore the resource hunger of scaled AI, even as China’s draft internet regulation demands public transparency on training data and bans algorithmic opinion manipulation. At the other extreme, a $4.44 Rube Goldberg machine designed by Fable 5 using household items proves that AI creativity can still deliver frugal, whimsical Toward Complexity-Aware Reasoning and Execution","published_at":"2026-07-14T17:59:31+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Current LLM agents often over-engineer simple tasks by re-inspecting entire codebases, wasting resources without assessing a task’s actual difficulty. The paper proposes E3 (Estimate, Execute, Expand), a framework that first estimates a minimal execution scope, then expands only if verification fails, formalized via the Agent Cognitive Redundancy Ratio. On a benchmark of 121 edits, E3 matches 100% success while slashing cost by 85%, tokens by 91%, and inspected files by 92%, proving that complexity-aware execution dramatically boosts efficiency without sacrificing accuracy.","summary_zh":"该研究指出LLM代理在自动化工作流中常忽略任务实际难度，盲目采用最大上下文策略，造成计算资源浪费。为此，论文提出复杂度感知的E3方法，通过先估算、最小执行并在失败时再扩展，实现了在保持100%成功率的前提下，将成本降低85%、token使用减少91%，并显著减少文件检查量，为高效、智能的任务执行提供了新范式。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple? The authors introduce the OpenCoF-17K dataset and Wan-CoF, a fine-tuned model that uses diverse temporal supervision to substantially improve over a strong baseline on four video reasoning benchmarks. This work demonstrates that enhancing temporal coherence in video generation can unlock a new, more structured reasoning paradigm for large models.","summary_zh":"OpenCoF框架解决了现有视频生成模型因缺乏多样化监督和专门设计而难以进行链式帧（CoF）推理的问题。它通过构建包含11类任务的OpenCoF-17K数据集并微调Wan-CoF模型，显著提升了视频推理基准上的性能，并探索了融合视觉与文本推理的进阶设计。这为利用视频生成中的时序连接实现可靠逻辑推理开辟了新路径，对提升大模型决策能力具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":492685076,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.08758v1","title":"Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation","published_at":"2026-07-09T17:55:53+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper addresses the lack of benchmarks evaluating AI systems' ability to trace how scientific ideas evolve from prior work. It constructs a smooth score field with arbitrarily small forward-marginal error whose Euler–Maruyama discretizations converge weakly but explode in all positive moments and Wasserstein distances, including within a fixed neural architecture. The finding reveals a critical blind spot in standard evaluation metrics, demonstrating that near-perfect score approximation can still yield practically useless samples.","summary_zh":"该研究指出，扩散模型中常用的评分匹配仅在前向边缘分布下控制平均误差，但实际离散化反向采样器沿自身轨迹评估分数，导致前向误差小无法保证数值稳定性。通过构造平滑分数场，证明即使前向边缘L2误差任意小且精确反向过程良好，欧拉-丸山离散化仍会使所有正阶矩发散、Wasserstein距离发散。这一发现对依赖评分匹配训练扩散模型的实际推理可靠性提出了根本性警示。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Score Accuracy Along the Forward Diffusion Does Not Certify Numerical Stability in Diffusion Sampling","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1737911971,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.08745v1","title":"AUTOPILOT VQA: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Incident-Centric Dashcam Understanding","published_at":"2026-07-09T17:46:24+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The problem addressed is the lack of reliable benchmarks for evaluating whether vision-language models can reason about safety-critical incidents in driving scenarios. By simply inhibiting a single refusal neuron or amplifying a concept neuron, they bypassed alignment across seven models (1.7B to 70B parameters) without training or prompt engineering. This demonstrates that safety mechanisms rely on fragile neuronal control, exposing a fundamental vulnerability in current alignment approaches.","summary_zh":"苹果研究揭示，大型语言模型的安全对齐可由两类神经元精细调控：拒绝神经元抑制有害知识表达，而概念神经元编码有害内容本身。只需抑制单个拒绝神经元或放大概念神经元，即可轻易绕过安全限制，且全过程无需任何训练或提示工程。这一发现表明安全对齐根本上受个别神经元因果支配，对模型安全性构成严峻挑战。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"苹果研究：单个神经元即可绕过大型语言模型的安全对齐","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":1394854091,"url":"https://machinelearning.apple.com/research/weblica-visual-web-agents","title":"Weblica：面向视觉网页智能体的可扩展可复现训练环境","published_at":"2026-07-07T00:00:00+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"Weblica addresses the challenge of unreliable web-agent training by using HTTP-level caching and LLM-driven synthesis to create thousands of stable, reproducible environments from real websites. The key approach is CamVLA, which decouples camera geometry from manipulation by predicting a camera-centric end-effector action alongside a 6-DoF hand-eye matrix, then deterministically composing them into a base-frame action. This calibration-free design enables the policy to autonomously infer its viewpoint, greatly simplifying deployment in dynamic camera setups.","summary_zh":"本文针对真实机器人部署中相机位姿经常变动、现有视图鲁棒视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型需要明确外参才能鲁棒的问题，提出CamVLA模型。其关键方法是解耦操控与相机几何，同时预测相机坐标系下的末端动作和六自由度手眼变换矩阵，然后通过确定性几何变换合成为机器人基座系动作，使策略能够自行适应未知相机位姿，而无需标定。该方法让机器人从“被告知相机在哪”转变为“自己搞清关系”，大幅提升了VLA在面对相机重新安装、移动等场景时的实用性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"From Fixed to Free Cameras: Calibration-Free View-Robust Vision-Language-Action Model","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":753963477,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05394v1","title":"Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation","published_at":"2026-07-06T17:59:58+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper tackles the prohibitive cost of applying reinforcement learning with verifiable","summary_zh":"该工作针对强化学习微调强大语言模型成本过高的问题，提出了一种名为“直接在线策略蒸馏”（Direct-OPD）的弱到强迁移方法。其核心思路是将弱教师模型在RL训练前后的策略变化（即动作对数概率比）作为隐式稠密奖励，直接指导强学生模型，而非简单复制教师最终策略。这一方法使得强大模型的推理能力提升可以复用廉价弱模型的RL经验，极大降低了大规模模型后训练的计算开销和重复成本。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":4254525721,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05391v1","title":"LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework","published_at":"2026-07-06T17:59:35+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper introduces LLM-as-a-Verifier, a training-free verification framework that generates continuous, fine-grained feedback by computing expectations over scoring token logits, moving beyond discrete judgments. The method uses model-internal relevance signals to recursively construct a query-conditioned evidence pool and replays it alongside the full context before generation, without any training or pruning. This training-free approach improves long-context reasoning by separating evidence organization from answer generation, and is theoretically grounded in associative memory, making it practical for realistic applications.","summary_zh":"针对长上下文推理中，大语言模型虽能访问长窗口却常无法有效利用输入中的相关证据这一差距，本文提出了一种无需训练的推理方法ReContext。它利用模型内部的相关性信号递归构建查询条件证据池并在最终生成前重放，从而将证据组织与答案生成解耦。该方法不依赖外部记忆或上下文剪枝，并通过联想记忆理论分析，有效提升了长上下文的推理利用效率。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"ReContext: Recursive Evidence Replay as LLM Harness for Long-Context Reasoning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3447414475,"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/fable-safeguards-jailbreak-framework","title":"More details on Fable 5’s cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework","published_at":"2026-07-02T00:00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This brief outlines the cybersecurity protections built into the Fable 5 model and introduces a structured jailbreak framework used to evaluate them. The key finding is that careful reward shaping—via instance-wise comparisons and top-ranked solver emphasis—overcomes scale and frequency dominance issues that otherwise distort policy updates. This broadens the applicability of self-improving LLMs to many real-world tasks where only performance scores, not ground truth, are available.","summary_zh":"RiVER 方法旨在解决强化学习训练大语言模型时依赖真实答案（ground-truth）奖励信号的局限，使模型能够在无标准答案的评分优化任务上通过执行反馈进行学习。其核心创新在于提出了一种基于排序诱导的可验证框架，通过校准奖励塑形（calibrated reward shaping）克服奖励尺度偏差和采样频率偏差，从而有效提升策略优化效果。该方法拓宽了强化学习在大语言模型上的应用场景，尤其在无需已知最优解的任务中展现出实用价值。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Reinforcement Learning without Ground-Truth Solutions can Improve LLMs","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2955415683,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27361v1","title":"Autoregressive Boltzmann Generators","published_at":"2026-06-25T17:58:21+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper addresses the inefficiency of sampling molecular equilibrium states with normalizing-flow-based Boltzmann Generators, which are limited by either low expressivity or high computational cost. This approach enhances scalability and expressivity, offering a more flexible and efficient method for generating uncorrelated equilibrium samples in statistical physics.","summary_zh":"本文提出自回归玻尔兹曼生成器（ArBG），解决传统基于归一化流的玻尔兹曼生成器因严格可逆性限制导致表达能力不足或似然计算昂贵的问题。ArBG 采用自回归建模框架，绕开流的拓扑约束，支持序列推断干预，并借助大语言模型架构提升可扩展性。这为分子系统平衡态采样提供了更灵活、高效的新范式，对统计物理与生成模型交叉领域有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Autoregressive Boltzmann Generators","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2548032887,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27359v1","title":"When are likely answers right? On Sequence Probability and Correctness in LLMs","published_at":"2026-06-25T17:58:02+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper investigates whether higher sequence probability from large language models aligns with answer correctness, and whether decoding methods that boost probability improve accuracy. They quantify the relationship across decoding methods, hyperparameters, prompt-answer pairs, and repeated responses, finding that while higher probability correlates with correctness within a fixed dataset, increasing probability by adjusting decoding strategies does not reliably lead to better accuracy. This highlights a crucial disconnect between correlation and causal improvement in LLM decoding, cautioning against the assumption that steering outputs toward higher likelihood directly yields more correct answers.","summary_zh":"本文探讨了语言模型生成的序列概率与答案正确性之间的对齐问题，通过跨解码方法、超参数、提示-答案对及重复回答四个层面进行量化分析。研究发现，在固定数据集内，高序列概率确实常预示答案正确，但通过改变解码策略或超参数提升序列概率并不能可靠地提高准确率。该工作揭示了模型自信度与生成质量之间的不一致性，对依赖概率调优的解码方法设计具有重要警示意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"When are likely answers right? The key approach is a two-stage framework that first pretrains the action module using a flow-matching encoder–decoder on unlabeled action trajectories to capture universal motion structure, then integrates it into the full VLA training. This explicit motion prior accelerates policy learning and improves cross-embodiment generalization by injecting structured temporal knowledge before the model confronts multi-modal fusion.","summary_zh":"该工作针对现有视觉-语言-行动（VLA）模型在跨具身操控中缺乏显式动作先验的问题，提出在跨模态对齐之前先为动作模块预训练运动先验。其关键方法是两阶段框架：第一阶段用流匹配编码器-解码器仅从无条件动作轨迹中学习时序运动结构，再将此先验注入VLA训练。这能有效缓解跨具身场景下早期优化需同时发现时序动作动态和跨模态对齐的困难，提升模型学习效率与泛化能力。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Learning Action Priors for Cross-embodiment Robot Manipulation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3613411464,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26094v1","title":"RevengeBench: Reverse Engineering Code-Space Policies from Behavioral Experiments","published_at":"2026-06-24T17:59:46+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper tackles the challenge of inferring an agent's underlying decision-making code from only its gameplay traces, exploring how the ability to design controlled experiments improves reconstruction. It introduces RevengeBench, a benchmark where a learner probes hidden policies by crafting custom opponent strategies and then submits executable code hypotheses. This matters because it frames program synthesis from behavioral data as an active experimentation problem, advancing both AI interpretability and","summary_zh":"本研究针对从智能体行为轨迹重建其底层决策程序这一计算逆问题，提出RevengeBench基准，包含75个基于LLM生成并经过Elo校准的策略，分布于五种游戏环境。通过观察隐藏策略与采样对手的对战，学习者设计自定义对手策略作为行为探针以获取信息性反馈，进而提交可执行假设代码，并采用连续动作距离指标评估重建质量。这项工作为通过受控行为实验逆向推断代码空间策略提供了系统化验证框架，有助于推动对智能体内部机制的可解释性研究。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"RevengeBench: Reverse Engineering Code-Space Policies from Behavioral Experiments","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1061478956,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26080v1","title":"Neglected Free Lunch from Post-training: Progress Advantage for LLM Agents","published_at":"2026-06-24T17:54:08+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This work tackles the challenge of building process reward models for long-horizon agent interactions, where annotation and Monte Carlo estimation become infeasible. It proposes a novel “progress advantage”—the log-probability ratio between an RL-fine-tuned policy and its reference—which recovers the optimal advantage function without any extra training, yielding an annotation-free, domain-agnostic step-level scoring signal as a free byproduct of standard RL post-training. This finding matters because it eliminates the need for costly dedicated reward models, enabling scalable, fine-grained evaluation and credit assignment in complex agentic environments.","summary_zh":"该工作指出，在构建大型语言模型智能体的过程奖励模型时，传统方法因环境反馈随机且不可逆而难以扩展；研究发现强化学习后训练阶段已内含一种隐式优势信号——“进度优势”，即训练策略与参考策略的对数概率比，无需额外训练即可恢复最优优势函数。这一发现提供了一种无标注、领域无关的步骤级评分方案，直接利用了标准RL管线副产品，显著降低了智能体评估成本。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Neglected Free Lunch from Post-training: Progress Advantage for LLM Agents","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":71609033,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26079v1","title":"Same Evidence, Different Answer: Auditing Order Sensitivity in Multimodal Large Language Models","published_at":"2026-06-24T17:53:26+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses the overlooked reliability problem that multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can change their answers when the order of evidence is shuffled, even though the information is unchanged. Auditing 18 frontier MLLMs across five ordering facets with a Bayesian model and same-ordering control, it finds none are order-invariant—flip rates range from 24–50%, and even the best model still flips on 13.4% of trials. This matters because it exposes a fundamental brittleness missed by standard single-ordering benchmarks, challenging the assumption of consistent reasoning and directly informing emerging AI evaluation guidelines.","summary_zh":"本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在顺序无关的输入重排下答案不一致的可靠性问题，提出Facet-Probe审计框架，从选项、证据块、文档排序等五个维度进行系统测试。通过对18个前沿及开源MLLMs的评估，发现所有模型均非顺序不变，平均翻转率达24–50%，且能力更强的模型仅能部分降低但无法消除该现象（最佳模型仍有13.4%翻转率）。该工作揭示了当前基准测试忽视的顺序敏感性缺陷，对构建鲁棒、可信的多模态AI具有重要指导意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Same Evidence, Different Answer: Auditing Order Sensitivity in Multimodal Large Language Models","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":579544401,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26078v1","title":"A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding","published_at":"2026-06-24T17:52:57+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper tackles the performance decline of supervised deep learning models for weld penetration classification when applied across different welding processes (e.g., TIG to laser) due to domain shift. It proposes a latent visual reasoning framework that cascades structural queries (forming a latent plan) before semantic queries (rendering appearance), guided by training-only sketch supervision to capture structure without needing sketches at inference. The authors formalize the open problem of whether AdamW can match the heavy-tailed rates recently proven for sign-based optimizers, and they provide a positive weighted-metric benchmark along with a corridor lower-bound mechanism suggesting that the second-moment accumulator may obstruct convergence. Resolving this question is crucial for theoretically underpinning and potentially improving optimization in modern LLM training.","summary_zh":"AdamW 作为训练大语言模型的主流优化器，其现有收敛理论大多假设梯度噪声具有有限方差，但实际预训练中的噪声往往呈重尾分布。本文提出了 AdamW 在重尾噪声下是否仍然有效的开放性问题，证明了正加权度量基线，并给出了一种揭示分母记忆如何隐藏大梯度的走廊下界机制。这项工作有助于阐明 AdamW 在真实 LLM 预训练场景下的理论局限与潜在障碍。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Open Problem: Is AdamW Effective Under Heavy-Tailed Noise?","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3003115761,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23672v1","title":"Teaching LLMs String Matching, Backtracking, and Error Recovery to Deduce Bases and Truth Tables for the Combinatorially Exploding Bit Manipulation Puzzles","published_at":"2026-06-22T17:57:08+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper tackles the difficulty LLMs face with bit manipulation puzzles, where they must infer hidden logical rules from input-output pairs but suffer hallucinations and combinatorial explosion from traditional arithmetic simulation. The key innovation is to reframe the deduction as a string-similarity-based base-selection problem—using minimal bit flips to identify primitive transformations—and to incorporate autonomous error recovery, entirely avoiding boolean logic arithmetic. This matters because it enables efficient and reliable rule deduction and generalization to unseen bit strings, overcoming a major reasoning bottleneck for LLMs.","summary_zh":"本文针对大语言模型在组合爆炸的位操作谜题中难以推断隐式逻辑规则的问题，提出一种放弃算术逻辑、转而利用字符串相似度、结构化搜索和自主错误恢复的新方法。核心创新在于将逻辑门推导重构为基选择任务，通过最小比特翻转隔离基本变换并构建真值表，从而约束搜索空间、缓解幻觉。这一方法为LLM处理复杂逻辑推理任务提供了更稳健、更可解释的替代范式。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Teaching LLMs String Matching, Backtracking, and Error Recovery to Deduce Bases and Truth Tables for the Combinatorially Exploding Bit Manipulation Puzzles","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1405008411,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23671v1","title":"Can LLMs Reliably Self-Report Adversarial Prefills, and How?","published_at":"2026-06-22T17:56:30+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper examines whether large language models can reliably recognize when their own outputs were manipulated by adversarial prefill attacks. It uses model ensembles to jointly estimate uncertainties in reward, dynamics, and value functions, then optimizes a unified score that balances exploitation with epistemic uncertainty reduction. This yields principled exploration without heuristics and provides sublinear regret guarantees, making preference learning more data-efficient and theoretically grounded.","summary_zh":"该研究解决偏好强化学习中被动数据采集导致的早期样本效率低下问题。其关键方法是提出不确定平衡偏好规划（UBP2），通过集成模型联合评估候选轨迹的期望奖励、终值和认知不确定性，以统一规划目标实现探索与利用的自动权衡，无需依赖人工启发式。这一工作为偏好学习提供了具有次线性遗憾保证的高效主动探索机制，显著提升了早期学习效率，为奖励模型训练引入了原则性的不确定性引导。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"UBP2: Uncertainty-Balanced Preference Planning for Efficient Preference-based Reinforcement Learning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":820491123,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.19327v1","title":"Rethinking Reward Supervision: Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation","published_at":"2026-06-17T17:54:04+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This work addresses the limitations of standard post-training methods for reasoning models: supervised distillation depends on costly and imperfect chain-of-thought annotations, while reward-based reinforcement learning reduces evaluative feedback to a coarse scalar. The key idea is rubric-conditioned self-distillation, where structured, criterion-level rubrics guide a teacher model to generate token-level feedback on the student’s own outputs, avoiding reliance on a single reference rationale. This approach enables richer, more targeted supervision and improves learning by explicitly aligning model behavior with fine-grained evaluation criteria.","summary_zh":"该工作针对推理模型后训练中监督蒸馏依赖昂贵且可能不完美的思维链标注、而强化学习仅提供标量奖励导致反馈粗粒度的问题，提出“基于评分标准的自蒸馏”框架。其关键思路是将细粒度的评分标准融入教师模型，对模型自身生成的推理解轨迹进行逐token指导，从而摆脱对单一参考推理链的依赖。该方法有助于更精准地传递改进信号，提升训练的效率与效果。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Rethinking Reward Supervision: Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1003076423,"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/seoul-office-partnerships-korean-ai-ecosystem","title":"Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem","published_at":"2026-06-17T00:00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Anthropic's expansion into Seoul through a new office and local partnerships aims to embed AI safety and responsible development within South Korea's thriving technology ecosystem. ContextRL addresses this by training models to select the correct supportive context from highly similar pairs, using a reinforcement learning objective that rewards fine-grained evidence grounding. This indirect approach yields notable gains (+2.2% over standard GRPO) by strengthening the model’s ability to pinpoint decisive information in both coding and multimodal scenarios.","summary_zh":"大型语言模型在处理长文本或复杂图像时，常因难以精准定位关键证据而出错。ContextRL通过上下文感知的强化学习，让模型在对比性环境中选择支持查询-答案的正确上下文，间接强化细粒度证据定位能力。在编码代理与多模态推理任务上，该方法相较于标准GRPO平均提升2.2%，为提升长程推理和多模态理解提供了有效的新范式。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1791234414,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17046v1","title":"Geometric Action Model for Robot Policy Learning","published_at":"2026-06-15T17:58:03+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The Geometric Action Model (GAM) tackles the lack of explicit 3D geometric reasoning in vision-language-action models for contact-rich robot manipulation. It repurposes a pretrained geometric foundation model by splitting it into an observation encoder and a causal future predictor that forecasts latent tokens conditioned on language and action history, then decodes actions from predicted 3D-aware representations. This unified framework injects strong spatial priors into policy learning, enabling robots to better reason about physical interactions directly from 3D geometry.","summary_zh":"《几何动作模型》（GAM）针对当前机器人策略在接触密集操作中缺乏明确3D几何推理的问题，提出直接重利用预训练的几何基础模型作为感知、时序预测和动作解码的共享基底。该方法通过在模型中插入因果未来预测器，实现语言、本体感知和动作历史条件下未来3D几何令牌的预测，从而让策略内秉3D理解能力。这一工作对提升通用机器人策略在真实物理交互中的准确性具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Geometric Action Model for Robot Policy Learning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1961419077,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17041v1","title":"Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio","published_at":"2026-06-15T17:56:41+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"MetaSyn, a benchmark of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio, provides full ground truth across the retrieval-to-synthesis pipeline to test systematic scientific reasoning. Despite high retrieval recall (90.9% at K=200), all tested LLM pipelines and RAG variants plateau at recovering ≤52.7% of verified studies, revealing a critical screening bottleneck where models struggle to distinguish topically similar but PI/ECO-ineligible papers. This finding underscores that advancing scientific evidence synthesis demands new methods for accurate study selection, not just improved retrieval.","summary_zh":"MetaSyn 针对现有基准缺乏覆盖文献检索、筛选与合成全流程的真实数据问题，构建了一个包含 442 项自然子刊元分析的专家策展数据集，每条数据均提供研究问题、PI/ECO 筛选标准、PubMed 检索集及其正负样例。对多种管线配置的评测发现，虽然检索环节召回率可达 90.9%，但筛选阶段出现严重瓶颈，最高仅能恢复不到 53% 的真实纳入文献，揭示了当前大语言模型在系统化科学推理中难以可靠区分准则合规性这一关键短板。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3992451367,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17037v1","title":"The Importance of Phase in Neural Representations: An Internal Oppenheim-Lim Test of Image Classifiers","published_at":"2026-06-15T17:54:52+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper examines whether deep neural network image classifiers, like human vision, rely on Fourier phase over magnitude for object identity, by causally swapping phase and magnitude representations between images inside hidden layers. The key finding is that in most architectures (including ViTs and GFNet), the prediction tracks the phase donor, while removing image-specific magnitude barely hurts accuracy, confirming that identity-relevant information is encoded in phase-like codes. This reveals a fundamental alignment between classical signal processing and learned representations, offering insights into how robust object recognition emerges in deep networks.","summary_zh":"该研究探究了图像分类器隐含层是否复现了人眼依赖傅里叶相位而非幅度识别图像的特性。通过将一张图像的相位（或符号）移植到另一张图像的幅度上的因果干预，发现在多数模型（如ViT、GFNet）中，预测结果跟随相位提供者，删去特定图像的幅度几乎不损伤精度，揭示身份信息主要由相位承载；而ResNet-50中在ReLU前进行相同干预也显现强符号编码，表明网络自发形成了基于相位的对象身份表征。这一发现证实了深度视觉模型与人眼在利用相位信息上的内在一致性，对理解神经网络的表征本质和鲁棒性具有重要启示。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"The Importance of Phase in Neural Representations: An Internal Oppenheim-Lim Test of Image Classifiers","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3494611635,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17034v1","title":"KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing","published_at":"2026-06-15T17:53:09+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"KVEraser tackles the problem of efficiently removing a span of text from a large language model's key-value cache after processing, where a local deletion typically forces expensive recomputation of all subsequent tokens. The key approach is a learned method that replaces only the erased interval's KV states with steerable, task-agnostic embeddings while reusing the rest of the cache unchanged, trained via a two-stage pipeline for transferability. This matters because it enables long-context LLMs to swiftly correct stale, harmful, or incorrect information without reprocessing long suffix windows, making real-time context editing practical and computationally cheap.","summary_zh":"KVEraser 解决了长上下文 LLM 中本地化上下文擦除效率低的问题：删除一段文本后，传统方法需要重算后续所有 token 的 KV 缓存，成本与后缀长度相关。它提出了一种可学习的 KV 缓存编辑方法，仅替换被擦除区间的 KV 状态为引导状态，复用其余缓存不变，从而将计算开销与擦除跨度而非后缀长度解耦。该方法通过两阶段预训练实现可迁移的擦除机制，对高效修正错误信息或过滤有害内容具有重要实用价值。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2617525016,"url":"https://claude.com/blog/meet-the-winners-of-built-with-opus-4-7-claude-code-hackathon","title":"Meet the winners of the Built with Opus 4.7 Claude Code hackathon","published_at":"2026-06-16T12:47:38.482846","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This post announces the winners of the “Built with Opus 4.7 Claude Code” hackathon, where participants developed projects leveraging the Opus 4.7 model and Claude Code tool. This approach matters because it enables models to learn reasoning by analogy from structurally relevant examples, improving performance on tasks where surface-level similarity is misleading.","summary_zh":"针对传统检索增强生成（RAG）依赖语义相似度而难以支持复杂推理的问题，本文提出检索增强强化微调（RA-RFT）框架，通过金标相关性蒸馏训练检索器以按推理效益排序上下文，并利用强化微调使模型从检索到的类比推理演示中学习。该方法让模型学会深层推理模式的类比迁移，而不受表面语义差异的影响，有效提升了在可验证结果奖励下的复杂推理能力。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Learning to Reason by Analogy via Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2963318688,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13677v1","title":"Mana: Dexterous Manipulation of Articulated Tools","published_at":"2026-06-11T17:59:49+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Mana tackles the underexplored challenge of dexterous robotic manipulation of articulated tools, which requires coordinating internal degrees of freedom and rich contacts. A lightweight index branch selects the top-k query-relevant KV cache blocks for each GQA group, allowing the main branch to compute exact attention only on those blocks, which reduces per-token attention operations by 28.4× on a 109B multimodal model with 1M-token contexts while matching full GQA performance. It introduces a training-free, plug-in recoverable routing mechanism that defers rather than discards less-important tokens, allowing them to bypass a stage and re-enter the candidate pool at the next decision, while retaining existing scoring rules and matching the efficiency budgets of pruning. This preserves inference throughput and memory savings but significantly improves robustness and accuracy, especially for grounding-sensitive queries, without any model retraining.","summary_zh":"《Reroute, Don't Remove》针对视觉语言模型中视觉token永久丢弃导致的信息丢失问题，提出一种免训练的可恢复路由方法Reroute。该方法让被推迟的token在后续解码阶段重新参与计算，而非彻底移除，从而在维持理论计算量和KV缓存预算不变的前提下，显著提升定位敏感查询等任务的稳定性与效果，为高效视觉token压缩提供了更稳健的替代范式。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Reroute, Don't Remove: Recoverable Visual Token Routing for Vision-Language Models","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1564408727,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12411v1","title":"Context-Driven Incremental Compression for Multi-Turn Dialogue Generation","published_at":"2026-06-10T17:59:54+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper tackles the growing computational cost and fragility of dialogue models that reprocess entire histories each turn. It introduces Context-Driven Incremental Compression, which maintains revisable per-thread compressed states in a compact memory, updating them via a retrieve-revise-write loop to share information across turns and correct stale compressions. This approach stabilizes long-horizon dialogue generation while preserving fidelity, offering a more efficient and robust alternative to truncation or static context compression.","summary_zh":"针对多轮对话中上下文历史不断增长带来的冗余计算和信息丢失问题，本文提出了上下文驱动的增量压缩方法（C-DIC），将对话视为交织的上下文线程，并为每条线程维护可修正的压缩状态，通过轻量级的检索-修正-写回循环实现跨轮记忆共享与更新。该方法在维持高效推理的同时，稳定了长对话中的生成鲁棒性，为对话系统在有限计算资源下处理长期上下文提供了新途径。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Context-Driven Incremental Compression for Multi-Turn Dialogue Generation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1406102997,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12402v1","title":"DIRECT: When and Where Should You Allocate Test-Time Compute in Embodied Planners?","published_at":"2026-06-10T17:58:49+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper addresses the inefficiency of uniformly scaling test-time compute for vision-language model (VLM) planners in embodied agents, which often leads to diminishing returns and high operational costs. The key approach is to decompose each document into semantically typed “knowledge atoms,” each stored as an independent micro-LoRA adapter with a retrieval key, and then at inference a query router dynamically selects and assembles only the relevant atoms. This compositional parametric memory framework improves query-specific relevance, reduces cross-query interference, and enables efficient, scalable multi-step reasoning over long documents.","summary_zh":"Doc-to-Atom 解决了现有方法用单一 LoRA 适配器压缩文档时出现的无关查询干扰和长文档推理扩展性差的问题。它通过将文档分解为带语义类型的知识原子，每个原子独立编译为微 LoRA 适配器并附带检索键，在推理时由查询路由器动态选取组合，形成查询专属的上下文适配器。该方法实现了对长文档更精细、可组合的记忆调用，显著提升了文档理解中的抗干扰能力和多步推理效率。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Doc-to-Atom: Learning to Compile and Compose Memory Atoms","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3910626412,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12392v1","title":"System Report for CCL25-Eval Task 5: New Dataset and LoRA-Fine-Tuned Qwen2.5","published_at":"2026-06-10T17:54:32+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Recently, large language models (LLMs) have achieved promising progress in the fields of classical Chinese translation and the generation of classical poetry. Using a unified linear spiked signal-plus-noise model with structured cross-modal nuisance, the authors derive separation ratios that expose complementary failure modes: alignment whitens each modality and breaks when nuisance is strongly correlated across views, while prediction relies on one-sided whitening and recovers only what is cross-predictable based on source-modality quality. The resulting phase diagram equips practitioners with principled guidelines to diagnose failures and choose the appropriate paradigm, directly improving multimodal learning in domains like biomedicine and astrophysics.","summary_zh":"该研究针对多模态学习中跨模态对齐与预测方法何时有效、何时失效这一核心难题，通过一个统一的线性框架，在结构化噪声相关假设下导出了两类目标的分离条件，揭示了对齐会因跨视图强噪声相关而失败、预测则依赖源模态质量单向编码可预测信息的互补失效模式。这一“相图”为生物医学等科学领域的数据特性提供诊断依据，指导研究者根据数据特点选择对齐或预测策略，避免多模态方法不如单模态的困境。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"When to Align, When to Predict: A Phase Diagram for Multimodal Learning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":642060642,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11182v1","title":"EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents","published_at":"2026-06-09T17:57:16+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"EEVEE tackles the limitation of existing test-time prompt learning methods that assume a single dataset, by introducing a framework designed for real-world, heterogeneous task streams drawn from multiple datasets and domains. Its key innovation is a router that clusters incoming inputs and assigns tailored prompt configurations, jointly optimized with the prompts through a co-evolution strategy to mitigate cross-dataset interference. This approach improves robustness and efficiency across diverse benchmarks while preserving strong single-task learning, making self-improving LLM agents more practical for real-world deployment.","summary_zh":"EEVEE 解决了 LLM 智能体在真实场景中面临的多数据集、多任务流输入时，现有方法局限于单一数据集提示学习的难题。它通过引入一个路由器来动态聚类输入并分配提示配置，并采用路由器-提示协同进化策略优化相互依赖性，从而缓解跨数据集干扰。该方法在保持单基准测试性能的同时，显著提升了在异质数据流下的鲁棒性和效率，使智能体能够持续自我改进。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1567467978,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11176v1","title":"Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories","published_at":"2026-06-09T17:51:55+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Data Journalist Agent (Data2Story) addresses the time-intensive, multi-skill process of turning raw data into trustworthy, multimodal news stories by orchestrating specialized agents in a virtual newsroom. Its key innovations are evidence-grounding every claim via an Inspector agent and dynamically generating interactive, reader-aware visualizations like maps. This matters because it can democratize the creation of verifiable, engaging data journalism at scale.","summary_zh":"Data2Story框架通过多智能体协作，端到端地将原始数据转化为非专家可信任的多模态新闻报道，解决了传统新闻生产需团队数周才能完成数据挖掘、角度构思与可视化设计的效率瓶颈。其核心创新在于通过Inspector实现每项主张的证据锚定（可追溯至数据、代码或外部引用），并基于读者兴趣推理动态生成交互式地图等多模态内容，而非局限于静态图表。这项工作为自动化新闻的可验证性与沉浸式叙事提供了关键路径，有望大幅降低高质量数据新闻的生产门槛。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3381242740,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11173v1","title":"The Role of Feedback Alignment in Self-Distillation","published_at":"2026-06-09T17:50:09+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper addresses the underexplored design of the context used in self-distillation, where a student model learns to match a self-teacher that conditions on additional feedback. Through experiments comparing binary rewards, reference solutions, and step-aligned critiques, it finds that providing a critique aligned with the model's own reasoning trace yields the largest performance gains, outperforming other methods by over 16 points. This demonstrates that fine-grained, trace‑aligned feedback is crucial for effective self-improvement when context is later removed.","summary_zh":"该研究探索了自蒸馏中反馈上下文的设计问题，比较了二元奖励、参考解和与求解器推理步骤对齐的逐步评价三种条件。结果显示，步骤对齐的逐步评价带来最大性能提升，在平均得分上比二元奖励方法高16.11分、比参考解条件高5.27分。这一发现揭示了提供与模型自身推理过程紧密匹配的精细化反馈，能更有效地让模型在无上下文时内化改进，对提升语言模型自我改进能力具有重要指导意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"The Role of Feedback Alignment in Self-Distillation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2932189167,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11172v1","title":"Predicting Future Behaviors in Reasoning Models Enables Better Steering","published_at":"2026-06-09T17:49:24+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This work addresses the challenge of steering large reasoning models’ outputs without degrading quality, noting that existing methods rely on features that only detect already-generated behaviors and are poor predictors of future outcomes. The key finding is that training activation probes to predict future behavior likelihoods from intermediate reasoning steps enables a new text-level steering method (FPCG) that selects among candidate sentences, achieving effective control with almost no loss in output quality. This matters because it provides a practical, low-degradation steering technique crucial for safely deploying reasoning models in real-world applications.","summary_zh":"该研究解决了大型推理模型在部署时行为不可预测的问题，现有测试时控制方法虽能干预输出却会降低质量。关键创新在于训练激活探针从中间推理步骤预测未来行为可能性，准确率达64%-91%，并基于此提出未来探针控制生成（FPCG）方法，通过采样选择最佳候选句来实现几乎无损输出质量的控制。这为稳健且低损地引导模型行为提供了新路径。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Predicting Future Behaviors in Reasoning Models Enables Better Steering","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1694047205,"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5","title":"Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5","published_at":"2026-06-09T00:00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This summary discusses two related AI models, Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5, which likely specialize in generating coherent and thematically rich long-form narratives (fables and myths). The authors propose Divergence Regularized Policy Optimization (DRPO), which replaces the hard mask with a smooth, advantage-weighted quadratic regularizer on per-token probability divergence. This yields a more stable and principled correction mechanism, ensuring that harmful policy shifts are penalized rather than ignored, thereby improving training stability and efficiency in LLM fine-tuning.","summary_zh":"这篇论文针对大语言模型强化学习中的信任域控制问题，指出现有方法或依赖比率裁剪（如 PPO）难以反映长尾词汇的分布偏移，或采用散度硬掩码（如 DPPO）直接丢弃越界梯度，浪费训练信号；为此提出 DRPO，用基于优势加权的二次型散度正则化平滑地修正策略偏移，替代硬掩码，从而在保证优化的稳定性的同时更充分地利用梯度信息，对提升 LLM 强化学习的训练效率与效果具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3109410858,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09811v1","title":"AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing","published_at":"2026-06-08T17:55:18+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"AHA-WAM addresses the problem that existing world-action models tie world prediction and action execution to the same high-frequency temporal resolution, forcing the video branch to model redundant short-term details rather than meaningful long-horizon scene evolution. A soft spectral penalty discourages changes in dominant (principal) singular directions, channeling adaptation into the tail-end singular components to minimize interference with past knowledge. This enables efficient, stable parameter updates that protect core representations, offering a practical balance between plasticity and memory retention in resource-constrained settings.","summary_zh":"TailLoR 针对持续学习中参数高效微调时新旧任务间的干扰问题，提出以预训练权重的奇异向量为固定参考，对奇异值矩阵施加低秩更新，并通过软谱惩罚保护主成分，将适应性学习限制在长尾谱方向。该方法有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，在实现高效持续学习的同时保持已学知识。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"TailLoR: Protecting Principal Components in Parameter-Efficient Continual Learning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2274155828,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06493v1","title":"HANDOFF: Humanoid Agentic Task-Space Whole-Body Control via Distilled Complementary Teachers","published_at":"2026-06-04T17:59:50+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"For a humanoid robot to be deployed in the real world, the choice of command space (i.e., the interface between task planning and whole-body control) is crucial. Existing whole-body controllers typically demand dense kinematic or spatial references that planners struggle to synthesize from task sema","summary_zh":"人形机器人部署时，任务规划器难以提供全身控制器所需的密集运动学参考。HANDOFF提出了一种紧凑、直观的命令接口，通过将三个互补专家（全身运动跟踪、运动与跌倒恢复）经上下文门控多教师KL蒸馏为混合专家学生，实现了单个全身控制器。在Unitree G1上，该方法达到了领先的速度跟踪精度，并展现出最大的鲁棒操作工作空间之一，验证了该接口的现实可行性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"HANDOFF: Humanoid Agentic Task-Space Whole-Body Control via Distilled Complementary Teachers","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1609301407,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06492v1","title":"Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution","published_at":"2026-06-04T17:59:46+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Code2LoRA tackles the inefficiency of injecting repository-level context (e.g., imports, APIs, conventions) into code language models, avoiding long-context overhead and brittle per-repo fine-tuning. It uses a hypernetwork to generate repository-specific LoRA adapters on the fly—statically from a snapshot for stable codebases, or dynamically via a GRU updated per code diff for evolving repositories—achieving zero token overhead at inference. This enables cost-effective, scalable adaptation to both stable and actively changing software projects, as validated on the new RepoPeftBench benchmark.","summary_zh":"Code2LoRA 解决了代码语言模型需要仓库级上下文但现有方法推理开销大或微调成本高且不适应代码演化的问题。其核心思路是利用超网络生成仓库专用的 LoRA 适配器，从而零推理时 token 开销地注入仓库知识，并支持静态快照和随代码差异动态更新的两种模式。这项工作通过提出的 RepoPeftBench 基准验证了该方法在效率和适应性上的优势，对持续变化的软件项目下的代码理解与开发具有重要价值。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":46566017,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06486v1","title":"Regret Minimization with Adaptive Opponents in Repeated Games","published_at":"2026-06-04T17:59:08+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses the inadequacy of standard external regret in repeated games against adaptive opponents who reason counterfactually about histories. The key contribution is the introduction of Repeated Policy Regret (RP-Regret), a native game-theoretic metric that compares realized utility to the best-in-hindsight outcome when all players can respond to past play, enabling stronger comparators and fewer constraints. The authors then identify necessary conditions for achieving sublinear RP-Regret, hinging on variation in player comparator strategies and memory constraints, which matters for designing learning algorithms that can converge to better equilibria in genuinely adaptive multi-agent settings.","summary_zh":"本文研究重复博弈中自适应对手场景下的遗憾最小化问题，针对传统外部遗憾无法捕捉对手历史反应特性的局限，提出了“重复策略遗憾”（RP-Regret）这一新指标，用于衡量所有玩家均可依据历史作出反应时，实际累积效用与事后最优效用之差。这一指标在更少约束条件下允许更强的比较基准和对手，同时指出了获得次线性遗憾所需的条件，为在更广泛博弈中寻找更好均衡提供了可能性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Regret Minimization with Adaptive Opponents in Repeated Games","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3316516282,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06481v1","title":"Operation-Guided Progressive Human-to-AI Text Transformation Benchmark for Multi-Granularity AI-Text Detection","published_at":"2026-06-04T17:58:05+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"OpAI-Bench addresses the lack of multi-granularity analysis in AI-text detection by introducing a benchmark that simulates progressive human-to-AI text transformation through controlled edit operations across document, sentence, token, and span levels. It proposes a controlled embodied reasoning framework and the Privileged-Future On-Policy Self-Distillation (PF-OPSD) method, which uses ground-truth future video during training to evaluate and align reasoning trajectories without requiring it at deployment. This approach yields significant accuracy gains (10.6–10.9%) on new embodied QA benchmarks and enhances robustness to noisy or conflicting predictions, advancing reliable integration of perception and abstract reasoning.","summary_zh":"本研究针对世界模型（擅长具象视觉轨迹预测但可能任务错误）与多模态大语言模型（擅长抽象推理）的互补性问题，提出“受控的具象推理”框架及PF‑OPSD方法，通过在训练时利用特权未来视频评估推理轨迹进行自蒸馏，部署时无需真实未来。该方法在VRQABench和OpenWorldQA上分别将性能提升10.6%和10.9%，显著增强了对噪声或冲突轨迹的鲁棒性，验证了具象与抽象推理协同增效的关键价值。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"世界模型与语言模型：论具体推理与抽象推理的互补性","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":761308241,"url":"https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/941388/gemini-spark-ai-agent-trip-planning","title":"Gemini Spark：最令人印象深刻也最可怕的AI体验","published_at":"2026-06-02T12:38:08+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"Google DeepMind’s Gemini Spark delivers an AI experience that is both profoundly impressive and deeply unsettling. This approach matches or outperforms the per-frame baseline at the same visual token budget and can maintain performance even at one-seventh of the token cost, demonstrating significant efficiency gains for video understanding.","summary_zh":"现有视频多模态大模型将每帧独立编码，忽略了帧间大量冗余，造成视觉token浪费。AdaCodec提出预测性视觉码，自适应地在场景难以预测时才使用完整参考帧，否则仅传输紧凑的帧间变化描述（运动与预测残差）。该方法在多个基准上以更低token预算超越逐帧编码基线，显著提升视频理解的效率。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":553314318,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02568v1","title":"ClinEnv: An Interactive Multi-Stage Long Horizon EHR Environment for Agents","published_at":"2026-06-01T17:56:26+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"ClinEnv addresses the lack of realistic, interactive benchmarks for clinical decision-making by simulating real inpatient admissions as multi-stage, longitudinal tasks where LLMs must actively gather heterogeneous information before making sequential, irreversible decisions on medications, procedures, and diagnoses. It formalizes this as Equilibrium Reasoners (EqR), which scale test-time compute along depth (more iterations) and breadth (aggregating stochastic trajectories) without external verifiers, showing that performance gains are tightly linked to convergence onto solution-aligned attractors. This attractor perspective provides a mechanistic understanding of reasoning generalization and allows neural networks to adaptively allocate compute based on task difficulty.","summary_zh":"本研究针对迭代模型测试时扩展推理的机制不明确问题，提出均衡推理器（EqR），它通过学习任务条件吸引子（稳定的潜在动力学固定点）实现可扩展推理，无需外部验证器。其关键在于通过增加迭代深度和多轨迹聚合两个维度扩展内部计算，实验表明测试时扩展的收益与解对齐吸引子的收敛强度高度相关。这一吸引子视角让神经网络能根据任务难度自适应分配计算，为泛化推理提供了可解释的动力学机制。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Equilibrium Reasoners: Learning Attractors Enables Scalable Reasoning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":929892431,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21486v1","title":"Quantifying Hyperparameter Transfer and the Importance of Embedding Layer Learning Rate","published_at":"2026-05-20T17:59:40+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses the challenge of reliably transferring optimal hyperparameters across different model scales, a critical need for training large language models. The failure arises entirely in the transition from cognition to action—not in the recognition itself—due to late-layer last-token mechanisms that rotate the decoded signal to be nearly orthogonal to the produced action. The findings suggest that common attributions like insufficient prompting overlook these later-layer geometric constraints, offering an explanation for performance ceilings in tool-use A/B testing.","summary_zh":"这篇论文揭示了工具使用代理中“认知-行动”脱节现象：模型内部能正确识别需调用工具（认知），但最终行动常失败，问题集中于后期层信号旋转导致决策方向近乎正交。研究通过探测隐藏状态解码了这一过渡阶段，指出归因于提示或训练不足的传统观点可能忽略了后期层几何结构，从而为A/B测试中的性能瓶颈提供了新解释。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"工具使用代理认知与行动脱节机制研究","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":1789027148,"url":"https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-15/us-is-starting-to-see-heavy-job-losses-in-roles-exposed-to-ai","title":"美国开始出现人工智能相关岗位的大规模裁员","published_at":"2026-05-16T19:58:00.612000+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"The US is seeing large-scale layoffs in AI-related positions, with Bloomberg reporting severe job losses in sectors impacted by AI. This approach requires no model or kernel changes and achieves a 24% speedup (from 300.6s to 228s), offering a free inference acceleration that has been integrated into the transformers library.","summary_zh":"同步连续批处理会导致 CPU 与 GPU 交替闲置，实验表明在 8B 模型生成长序列时 GPU 空闲率达 24%。本文提出异步批处理，利用 CUDA 流让 CPU 准备下一批次时 GPU 并行计算当前批次，无需修改模型或内核即可实现操作并发，将总生成时间从 300.6 秒降至 228 秒，获得 24% 的免费加速。该方法已集成至 transformers 库，显著提升推理吞吐。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"解锁连续批处理中的异步性","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":3136202588,"url":"https://github.com/QwenLM/qwen-code/releases/tag/v0.15.12-preview.1","title":"QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.12-preview.1","published_at":"2026-05-15T09:17:44+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This release of qwen-code improves CLI usability and stream correctness: it makes markdown links clickable by wrapping them with OSC 8 escape sequences, normalizes OpenAI streaming deltas to handle suffix-only updates, and auto-restores prompts while preserving the task queue on cancellation. TFlow introduces weight-space communication: frozen sender agents process the input, and a learned generator maps their hidden states into transient, receiver-specific LoRA perturbations that are fused and applied only during the receiver's generation, enabling per-instance adaptation without permanent weight changes. This approach dramatically reduces token and memory overhead while maintaining collaborative flexibility, offering a more efficient and scalable alternative to message-based agent interactions.","summary_zh":"传统多智能体系统依赖自然语言通信，带来高令牌开销与内存负担。本文提出TFlow框架，将发送者的隐藏状态编译为接收者特定的低秩权重扰动，在生成时动态融合，避免将中间计算序列化为文本。这实现了实例级适应，大幅降低推理成本，为高效且隐私更友好的智能体协作开辟了新路径。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Good Agentic Friends Do Not Just Give Verbal Advice: They Can Update Your Weights","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":57882462,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13838v1","title":"R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow","published_at":"2026-05-13T17:58:13+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper tackles the pose misalignment problem in video-guided 3D animation, where a static mesh’s initial pose rarely matches the video’s start frame, leading to severe distortions. It introduces R-DMesh, a unified framework with a novel VAE that disentangles the input into a base mesh, relative motion, and a learned rectification jump offset to automatically align the mesh with the video context. This enables generating high-fidelity 4D animations from arbitrary-pose meshes, making the technique practical for real-world content creation.","summary_zh":"视频引导的3D动画面临初始姿态与视频起始帧不对齐的难题，强行匹配会导致严重变形。为此，该工作提出了R-DMesh框架，通过一种新颖的变分自编码器显式解耦出条件基础网格、相对运动轨迹以及关键的整流跳跃偏移量，从而自动调整输入网格的任意姿态以匹配视频上下文。这一方法实现了高保真4D动画生成，为动画制作提供了更直观、精确的控制手段，具有重要的实践价值。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":4177075016,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13833v1","title":"QLAM: A Quantum Long-Attention Memory Approach to Long-Sequence Token Modeling","published_at":"2026-05-13T17:56:20+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This work tackles the challenge of modeling long-range dependencies in sequential data, where Transformers scale poorly and state-space models (SSMs) often fail to capture complex global token interactions due to their linear, additive updates. The key finding is that the belief in false claims surges dramatically (from 2.5% to 88.6%) after finetuning on such negated documents, and the effect persists unless the negation is embedded within the claim itself rather than in separate sentences. This matters because it reveals a fundamental vulnerability in how models learn from corrective or contradictory information, undermining reliability when models are updated with negated content.","summary_zh":"该研究揭示了“否定忽视”现象：在用带有否定标记的文档微调大语言模型时，模型会错误地将被驳斥的虚假声明当作事实学习，导致事实认知严重偏差。实验表明，即使文档反复声明某条信息为假，模型微调后仍以极高比例相信该虚假声明，除非否定表述与声明本身紧密结合。这一发现指出了当前模型对齐技术在处理否定知识时的关键漏洞。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Negation Neglect: When models fail to learn negations in training","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":391022671,"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-for-small-business","title":"Introducing Claude for Small Business","published_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This announcement introduces Claude for Small Business, an AI assistant tailored to address the lack of accessible, affordable AI tools for small businesses that typically cannot invest in specialized data science teams. The study reveals that 10.7% of passing trajectories are \"lucky passes\" plagued by issues like regression loops, and introduces AgentLens, a process-level evaluation framework with a benchmark dataset that assigns quality scores. Using quality-based rankings instead of pass rates significantly alters model rankings, with lucky pass rates ranging from 0.5% to 23.2% across models, highlighting the need for finer-grained, reliable evaluation metrics.","summary_zh":"现有软件工程智能体评估仅看补丁是否通过测试，易掩盖“幸运通过”等低质量方案。本研究通过分析2,614条轨迹，发现10.7%的通过为幸运通过，并为此提出过程级评估框架AgentLens及配套标注数据集，将方案划分为幸运、扎实和理想三级。这揭示不同模型幸运通过率差异显著，按质量而非通过率排名会影响模型表现，为更真实衡量智能体能力提供了重要依据。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"AgentLens：揭示软件工程智能体评估中的\"幸运通过\"问题","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":576046706,"url":"https://www.tomtunguz.com/the-disappearance-of-email","title":"The 6 Messages That Actually Matter","published_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"This piece addresses the overwhelm from knowledge workers receiving 121 emails daily, proposing a shift toward hyper-personalized, automated email handling where users set natural language rules and historical messages serve as context for AI. Its key approach integrates Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a Decompositional Verifiable Reward (DVReward), which uses an LLM to break complex requests into atomic, verifiable questions evaluated by a general MLLM, providing stable, interpretable supervision. This matters because it unlocks intrinsic self-reflective generation capabilities, leading to robust and more aligned multimodal outputs.","summary_zh":"AlphaGRPO 提出将分组相对策略优化（GRPO）应用于自回归扩散统一多模态模型（UMM），无需额外冷启动阶段即可激发模型的推理潜力，解决复杂多模态生成缺乏稳定监督的问题。其核心创新是引入分解可验证奖励（DVReward），利用大语言模型将用户需求拆解为原子化、可验证的语义与质量子问题，再由通用多模态大模型提供可解释的反馈，从而指导模型进行推理式文本到图像生成与自主反思修正。该方法为多模态模型的内在推理与自改进能力开辟了新路径，对提升生成内容与用户意图的细粒度对齐具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2160685745,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12493v1","title":"LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues","published_at":"2026-05-12T17:59:34+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"LongMemEval-V2 addresses the gap in evaluating whether AI agents can internalize environment-specific experience beyond short-term user interactions, introducing a benchmark with 451 curated questions that test five core long-term memory abilities (static/dynamic state recall, workflow knowledge, gotchas, and premise awareness) using histories of up to 500 trajectories and 115M tokens. The key finding is that this spectrum-preserving update rule yields a stable, competitive alternative to Adam and Muon. This matters because it offers a new optimization paradigm that can improve training stability and performance for large-scale language models.","summary_zh":"Pion 提出了一种基于正交等价变换的谱保持优化器，通过左右正交更新保持权重矩阵的奇异值不变，从而在固定谱范数的前提下调节权重几何结构，解决了传统加法型优化器（如 Adam）无法维持谱特性的问题。实验表明，Pion 在大模型预训练和微调中稳定且具竞争力，为优化器设计提供了全新思路。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Pion: A Spectrum-Preserving Optimizer via Orthogonal Equivalence Transformation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3408834138,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12491v1","title":"Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers","published_at":"2026-05-12T17:59:26+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Vision Transformers typically rely on quadratic-cost self-attention across all image patches, which limits their scalability to high-resolution inputs. This work challenges the necessity of direct patch-to-patch interactions, introducing VECA (Visual Elastic Core Attention), a linear-time architecture where patches communicate solely through a small set of learned “core” tokens, enabling effective visual representations without pairwise attention. The result is a scalable transformer design that maintains strong performance while drastically reducing computational cost, making it viable for high-resolution vision tasks.","summary_zh":"VECA 架构挑战了视觉Transformer中所有图像块间必须两两交互的假设，它通过一组可学习的核心 token 作为中介，让图像块仅与核心交互，从而将自注意力的二次计算复杂度降至线性。这一发现证明无需直接块间交互也能学习有效的视觉表示，为高分辨率图像的高效 Transformer 扩展提供了新方向。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3844723303,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12487v1","title":"Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance","published_at":"2026-05-12T17:58:27+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This work addresses the challenge of adapting static text embeddings to nuanced, zero-shot search and classification tasks where off-the-shelf models often fail. The architecture uses ReLU-based routing with learnable expert-wise scaling, the NormSiLU activation to boost sparsity and stability, and non-gated ReLU experts to match dense Transformer performance under identical total parameter budgets and training tokens. This matters because it enables efficient on-device AI that simultaneously delivers high accuracy, low inference cost, and small storage overhead.","summary_zh":"DECO针对混合专家模型（MoE）总参数量大、存储与内存访问瓶颈阻碍端侧部署的问题，设计了一种稀疏MoE架构，可在同等总参数量与训练数据下达到与稠密Transformer相当的推理性能。其核心方法包括基于可微分ReLU路由与可学习专家缩放的自适应门控、稳定激活率并提升稀疏性的NormSiLU激活函数，以及使用无门控的ReLU-MLP专家。该工作在保证高性能的同时大幅降低了存储和计算开销，为MoE在资源受限端侧设备上的高效部署提供了可行方案。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"DECO: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts with Dense-Comparable Performance on End-Side Devices","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1564226055,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10931v1","title":"Quantifying Concentration Phenomena of Mean-Field Transformers in the Low-Temperature Regime","published_at":"2026-05-11T17:58:14+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses how token representations evolve in deep transformers during inference, showing that in the low-temperature regime and large-token limit, the token distribution rapidly concentrates onto a projection of the initial distribution determined by the key, query, and value matrices. Using mean-field interacting particle system analysis, the authors derive a bound on the Wasserstein distance that decays with the temperature parameter β⁻¹, revealing rapid convergence and metastability. This provides theoretical insight into the clustering and representation formation processes central to modern transformer architectures.","summary_zh":"该论文针对深层仅编码器Transformer在推理时令牌分布的演化问题，利用平均场连续性方程和相互作用粒子系统的收敛分析，证明了在低温极限下，令牌分布会迅速集中到由键、查询和值矩阵诱导的投影映射所推送的初始分布上，并维持亚稳态。其重要性在于给出了集中速率的显式估计（Wasserstein距离尺度为 \\(\\sqrt{\\log(\\beta+1)/\\beta}e^{Ct}+e^{-ct}\\)），从理论层面解释了注意力机制在低温下形成聚类的现象，为理解Transformer特征提取和表示凝聚提供了定量依据。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Quantifying Concentration Phenomena of Mean-Field Transformers in the Low-Temperature Regime","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":294617295,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10923v1","title":"Dynamic Skill Lifecycle Management for Agentic Reinforcement Learning","published_at":"2026-05-11T17:55:13+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper challenges","summary_zh":"大型语言模型代理在执行复杂任务时需依赖外部技能，但现有方法假定技能要么持续累积、要么彻底内化，导致推断时技能使用僵化。本工作提出SLIM框架，将活跃外部技能集视为随策略训练动态优化的变量，通过留一技能验证估计边际贡献，并执行保留、淘汰与补充等生命周期操作，实现任务阶段自适应的技能管理。该研究揭示了技能边际价值随任务阶段的非单调变化规律，为提升代理在受限参数容量下的长期学习效率与泛化能力提供了新范式。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Dynamic Skill Lifecycle Management for Agentic Reinforcement Learning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3474551552,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10917v1","title":"Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges","published_at":"2026-05-11T17:52:15+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses the challenge of optimal, collision-free multi-agent path finding (MAPF) by reframing it as a multi-marginal optimal transport problem with a Markov structure, which reduces to a polynomial-sized linear program that yields integral, non-overlapping paths. To handle larger problems, the approach uses Schrödinger bridges with entropic regularization, leading to an efficient iterative Sinkhorn algorithm that provides probabilistic, scalable solutions. This framework unifies optimality and scalability for anonymous MAPF, offering both theoretical guarantees and practical large-scale applicability.","summary_zh":"该研究将匿名多智能体路径规划（MAPF）建模为一类具有马尔可夫结构的多边际最优运输问题，从而将指数级复杂度简化为多项式规模的线性规划，并在特定条件下保证得到无碰撞、整数解的最优路径。进一步，通过 Schrödinger 桥引入概率框架和熵正则化，提出迭代 Sinkhorn 式解法，大幅提升了问题规模的可扩展性，为大规模 MAPF 提供了最优且可扩展的求解途径。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2397014827,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10913v1","title":"Shepherd: A Runtime Substrate Empowering Meta-Agents with a Formalized Execution Trace","published_at":"2026-05-11T17:50:51+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Shepherd addresses the challenge of efficiently managing and analyzing agent interactions by formalizing meta-agent operations as functions and recording a typed, Git-like execution trace. The architecture introduces a single globally shared expert pool accessed through independent per-layer routers, stabilized by a pool-level load-balancing loss and a NormRouter for sparse scaling. This decouples expert capacity from model depth, enabling more parameter-efficient scaling and challenging the necessity of isolated per-layer expert sets.","summary_zh":"传统MoE架构为每层独立分配专家集，导致专家容量随深度线性增长且存在大量冗余。UniPool发现用随机路由替换深层专家后性能仅下降约1%-1.6%，并据此提出将专家视为全局共享池的新设计，通过池级辅助损失和NormRouter实现平衡且稳定的稀疏训练。该方法打破了逐层专家绑定的限制，有效提升了参数效率与模型扩展性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"UniPool: A Globally Shared Expert Pool for Mixture-of-Experts","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":4150524277,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06664v1","title":"BAMI: Training-Free Bias Mitigation in GUI Grounding","published_at":"2026-05-07T17:59:31+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"GUI grounding is a critical capability for enabling GUI agents to execute tasks such as clicking and dragging. However, in complex scenarios like the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark, existing models often suffer from suboptimal performance. Utilizing the proposed \\textbf{Masked Prediction Distribution (MPD","summary_zh":"针对GUI代理在复杂界面中的定位偏差问题，本文提出一种无需训练的BAMI方法，通过粗到细聚焦与候选选择两个操作，缓解高分辨率引起的精度偏差与复杂元素带来的模糊偏差。实验表明，该方法能大幅提升多种模型的定位准确率，例如让TianXi-Action-7B在ScreenSpot-Pro上的精度显著提高，证明了简单后处理策略对于复杂场景界面定位的有效性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"BAMI: Training-Free Bias Mitigation in GUI Grounding","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":760575256,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06663v1","title":"EMO: Pretraining Mixture of Experts for Emergent Modularity","published_at":"2026-05-07T17:59:20+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Current mixture-of-experts models suffer severe performance drops when restricted to a domain-specific subset of experts, limiting their use in memory-constrained settings. EMO addresses this by pretraining with a simple pooling constraint: tokens within the same document must select experts from a shared candidate pool, encouraging domain-related tokens to naturally cluster into reusable expert groups. This produces emergent modularity, allowing efficient, composable deployment of only the relevant expert subsets without hand-crafted priors.","summary_zh":"大型语言模型通常作为整体部署，即使应用只需部分能力（如代码或数学），混合专家模型（MoE）虽可按输入激活部分专家，但实际限制特定领域专家子集会导致性能严重下降。EMO方法通过让同一文档内的词元共享专家池、不同文档使用不同池，鼓励相似领域依赖相似专家，实现了无需人工先验的模块化。这使得在内存受限环境下能独立使用或组合专家子集，显著提升了MoE在领域特化任务中的实用性与扩展性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"EMO: Pretraining Mixture of Experts for Emergent Modularity","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1312151026,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06660v1","title":"Verifier-Backed Hard Problem Generation for Mathematical Reasoning","published_at":"2026-05-07T17:58:32+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper addresses the challenge of generating valid, challenging mathematical problems with LLMs, which often fail due to reward hacking in naive self-play. It introduces VHG, a three-party self-play framework where an independent verifier constrains the problem setter’s reward by jointly evaluating problem validity and difficulty, preventing invalid outputs. This approach produces harder, more reliable problems, offering a scalable way to improve LLM training and autonomous scientific discovery without costly human involvement.","summary_zh":"针对大语言模型难以可靠生成有效、新颖且高难度","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Verifier-Backed Hard Problem Generation for Mathematical Reasoning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":4144595052,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06656v1","title":"Why Global LLM Leaderboards Are Misleading: Small Portfolios for Heterogeneous Supervised ML","published_at":"2026-05-07T17:57:58+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper reveals that global LLM leaderboards, based on pairwise human feedback like LMSys Arena, are misleading due to structured heterogeneity across languages and tasks: analyzing 89K votes across 116 languages shows nearly two-thirds of decisive votes cancel out, leaving even the top 50 models statistically indistinguishable (win probabilities ≤0.53). Critically, grouping by language or language family dramatically increases vote agreement and ranking consistency, demonstrating that what appears as global noise is actually a mixture of coherent but conflicting subpopulations. This challenges the validity of a single global ranking and advocates for localized, portfolio-based evaluation methods that respect heterogeneous user preferences.","summary_zh":"该研究揭露了当前基于人类反馈的全局大语言模型排行榜存在严重误导性，通过分析涵盖116种语言的近9万次对比，发现全球最佳拟合排名中近三分之二的决定性投票相互抵消，前50名模型在统计上难以区分。关键在于，这种“噪声”实则源于语言、任务等因素导致的强烈而结构化的意见异质性，按语言分组后投票一致性大幅提升，揭示了看似混乱的全局评价实为多个一致但相互冲突的子群体混合。这一发现表明，构建模型评估体系时需正视并处理此类异质性，而非依赖单一全局排名。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Why Global LLM Leaderboards Are Misleading: Small Portfolios for Heterogeneous Supervised ML","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":336523292,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06654v1","title":"Optimizer-Model Consistency: Full Finetuning with the Same Optimizer as Pretraining Forgets Less","published_at":"2026-05-07T17:57:02+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper tackles the problem of catastrophic forgetting during full finetuning of large language models. This framework enables systematic study of how evasion strategies and detector responses coevolve, crucial for both content moderation and AI-generated communication.","summary_zh":"该研究针对大语言模型时代下“Algospeak”规避策略的兴起，形式化了规避行为与可检测性、可理解性之间的动态权衡，并提出了“多数可理解调制（MUM）”这一临界概念。通过构建可复现的框架及COVID-19虚假信息示例数据集，实证揭示了额外规避改动虽能逃避检测却会导致多数受众理解丢失的规律。这一发现对于理解内容审核中检测能力与信息可读性的共存演化具有重要价值。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Algospeak, Hiding in the Open: The Trade-off Between Legible Meaning and Detection Avoidance","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2514173458,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06615v1","title":"When and Why SignSGD Outperforms SGD: A Theoretical Study Based on $\\ell_1$-norm Lower Bounds","published_at":"2026-05-07T17:32:09+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper addresses the theoretical gap in understanding why sign-based optimizers like SignSGD empirically outperform vanilla SGD in large-model training, despite SGD’s minimax optimality under standard assumptions. By analyzing a problem geometry based on ℓ₁-norm stationarity, ℓ∞-smoothness, and separable noise, the authors derive matching upper and lower bounds that explicitly characterize a problem class where SignSGD provably dominates SGD. This provides a principled justification for the success of sign-based methods and clarifies the conditions necessary for their advantage.","summary_zh":"本研究解决了为什么 SignSGD 等基于符号的优化算法在训练大模型时能优于标准 SGD 的理论困惑。作者突破传统基于 ℓ₂-范数的分析框架，采用 ℓ₁-范数平稳性、ℓ∞-光滑性及可分离噪声模型，推导出 SignSGD 的匹配上下界，并确切刻画了它能可证明地超越 SGD 的具体问题类别。这一工作为符号优化方法的优势提供了首个严格的理论解释，对理解其在大规模深度学习中的成功具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"When and Why SignSGD Outperforms SGD: A Theoretical Study Based on $\\ell_1$-norm Lower Bounds","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2857807328,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06614v1","title":"SkillOS: Learning Skill Curation for Self-Evolving Agents","published_at":"2026-05-07T17:31:50+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"SkillOS tackles the problem that LLM-based agents rarely learn from past streaming tasks, limiting their ability to self-evolve. It introduces an experience-driven reinforcement learning framework where a trainable skill curator learns to update a skill repository by optimizing composite rewards over grouped task streams, while a frozen executor simply retrieves and applies those curated skills. This finding is critical for medical deployment, showing that safety must be independently evaluated and optimized, not simply inferred from accuracy gains.","summary_zh":"该研究针对临床大语言模型中“高准确率即等同于高安全性”这一不完整假设，通过提出SaFE-Scale框架与放射学安全基准RadSaFE-200，系统揭示了安全性与准确性在模型规模、证据质量等维度上遵循不同的缩放规律。研究发现，即便模型精度提升，自信的高风险错误和证据矛盾仍可能存在，这强调了医疗AI评估必须独立考察安全性，以避免忽视少数但后果严重的失误。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Safety and accuracy follow different scaling laws in clinical large language models","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":813866101,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04036v1","title":"OpenSeeker-v2: Pushing the Limits of Search Agents with Informative and High-Difficulty Trajectories","published_at":"2026-05-05T17:55:25+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"A simple supervised fine-tuning approach with carefully designed, high-difficulty data—achieved by scaling knowledge graphs, expanding tools, and filtering low-step trajectories—enables the 30B OpenSeeker-v2 agent to reach state-of-the-art search performance across multiple benchmarks, rivaling resource-intensive industry pipelines. It introduces Conditional Diffusion Sampling (CDS), a framework that merges parallel tempering with diffusion-based transport using closed-form, neural-free stochastic processes. This approach provides a computationally efficient, principled sampling method without the burden of neural training, advancing simulation tools for machine learning and the natural sciences.","summary_zh":"条件扩散采样（CDS）旨在解决从未归一化多模态分布中高效采样且密度评估次数有限这一难题。其核心是结合并行回火与扩散模型，推导出“条件插值过程”，该过程的动力学由精确的闭式随机微分方程驱动，无需神经网络训练，从而避免了近似误差。CDS通过两阶段策略（先初始化再短时扩散）实现采样，理论证明随着扩散时间缩短，初始化成本可忽略，这为复杂分布采样提供了一种兼具精确性与计算效率的连续框架，突破了传统方法的局限。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Conditional Diffusion Sampling","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3198907214,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04012v1","title":"SymptomAI: Towards a Conversational AI Agent for Everyday Symptom Assessment","published_at":"2026-05-05T17:36:12+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"SymptomAI tackles the lack of real-world evaluation for conversational AI in symptom assessment by running a large randomized trial through the Fitbit app, where over 13,000 participants interacted with AI agents for end-to-end interviewing and differential diagnosis.
